focus: Runtime preset library and actual graphics for generated modules, not builder chrome.
runtimeFixes: Mapped block-level surfaceVariant options default/elevated/outlined/tinted/glass/solid to runtime CSS.
Mapped semanticTone default/brand/info/success/warning/danger to runtime border and emphasis states.
Mapped density comfortable/compact/dense and preserved relaxed/spacious runtime density.
Mapped themePreset, shellPreset, motionPreset, visualLanguage, heroMood, iconStyle, chartStyle, panelGlass, cssVars to runtime behavior.
Added module-level preset studio that edits schema.runtimeDesign and previews runtime output, not builder chrome.
Added auto-style for existing blocks so preset intent becomes visible even on legacy modules.
tests: VM smoke for preset resolution, runtime render wrapper, block attribute mapping, builder export and probe schema
